The '''Diamond-Boron Missile''' was a type of [[missile]] that first saw use during during the [[Clone Wars]] and continued to be utilized into the [[First Order-Resistance War|conflict]] between the [[First Order]] and the [[Resistance]].<ref name="FFG" /> It had the capability of deflecting [[laser]] blasts from a standard [[starfighter]].<ref name="SWZ">{{FFGXW2|set=Hyena-class Droid Bomber Expansion Pack|cardname=Diamond-Boron Missiles}}</ref>
